name: Sunny Citrus Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in grapefruit juice.
2. Add orange juice, orange extract, and sugar. Stir until dissolved.
3. Pour into an 8-inch square pan.
4. Chill until partially set.
5. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts if desired.
Serving Information:
- Without nuts: 1 serving contains 24 Calories - 1/2 fruit and vegetable choice.
- With nuts: 1 serving contains 33 Calories - 1/2 fruit and vegetable choice, 1/2 fats and oils choice.
